hooks.command: r="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}"; d="$r/skills/commentable-html"; m="$d/.skill-resources-1.197.0.ok"; [ -f "$m" ] && exit 0; py=""; for c in python3 python py; do p=$(command -v "$c" 2>/dev/null) || continue; case "$p" in *WindowsApps*) continue;; esac; "$p" -I -c pass >/dev/null 2>&1 && { py="$p"; break; }; done; [ -n "$py" ] && "$py" -I "$r/hooks/extract_resources.py" --version 1.197.0 --agent claude >/dev/null 2>&1; true
